threshold_source: e02s01 sections 14-16; no epic-level numeric test plan exists

performance.criterion: Affected approval, agent, tool, and sandbox security suite completes in under 1 second

reliability.criterion: Denied, invalid, and unsafe writes produce zero side effects while full regression remains green
reliability.actual: 115 project tests and 9 example tests passed; denial and invalid-write sentinels remained unchanged

operability.criterion: Users receive explicit safe approval context and correlated denial reasons without content disclosure
operability.actual: CLI fake-stream confirmation, approval_denied JSON correlation, and secret-free verbose preview tests passed
